testcase.name: test_dashboard_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_125.py:154: in test_dashboard_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Dashboard failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Dashboard failed: 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
